name: Battle Sheep
author: Abstract Games factory
description: Battle Sheep (Blue Orange, designer Francesco Rotta -- 'Splitter'): on a hex pasture each player starts with a single tower of 16 sheep. On your turn you SPLIT a stack -- leave at least one sheep behind, take the rest off the top -- and slide that group in one of the six straight hex directions as FAR as it can go, stopping just before a board edge or another stack. No captures. When nobody can move, the player occupying the MOST hexes wins; the tie-break is the largest single connected herd. The platform reuses its stacking glyph (an owner-coloured tower with a height badge). Uses a fixed 32-hex board (8 four-hex tiles).
